overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a character walking through a sunny urban residential neighborhood with palm-lined streets. The character encounters small animals and crosses streets while exploring the environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past tall hedges and palm trees

tall dense green hedge forming a continuous wall along the sidewalk
tall palm tree with textured trunk and green fronds lining the street
two-story beige commercial building with dark tinted windows and flat roof
wooden utility pole with multiple power lines running across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny sidewalk bordered by a tall green hedge on the left and palm trees on the right. A real estate sign stands near the corner, and a modern office building is visible across the street. The environment is quiet with only parked cars visible.

character stops walking and turns to observe the dogs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a commercial building covered in blue graffiti art. Two small dogs appear on the sidewalk near a planter, causing the character to stop and observe them. A yellow fire hydrant is visible on the right, and an open garage reveals a parked car.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with commercial plaza and industrial backdrop

events.description: character crosses the asphalt street at an intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk past other pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at an intersection, moving from the commercial area toward a more open zone. Industrial smokestacks are visible in the distance, and a large billboard stands near a commercial plaza. Other pedestrians are walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential neighborhood with single-family homes and fenced yards

agents.ego_description: walking through a residential area passing houses and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman standing near a white metal fence looking at her phone

single-story house with blue awning and white trim

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a quiet residential neighborhood with single-family homes, white fences, and palm trees. A white church-like building is visible across the street. The character passes a woman standing near a fence and continues along the tree-lined sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban environment that shifts from a quiet commercial strip into a peaceful residential neighborhood. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a tall green hedge and palm trees, passing a real estate sign and a modern office building. As the camera moves forward, the scene transitions toward a building covered in blue graffiti where the character pauses to observe two small dogs near a yellow fire hydrant. The movement then carries the character across a street intersection, moving past a large billboard and distant industrial smokestacks while weaving through other pedestrians. Finally, the environment opens into a quiet residential zone characterized by white fences and single-family homes, passing a white church-like building and a woman standing by a fence under the shade of palm trees.
